fdaDisclaimer.heading: Regulatory information, not legal advice
fdaDisclaimer.body: This page summarizes US import and FDA requirements for general information only and is not legal advice. Tobacco-product regulation changes without notice and enforcement is fact-specific. Confirm your obligations with a licensed US customs broker and qualified counsel before importing.
